name: Progres with Grand Marnier III (Mousse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the cream using a whisk until stiff peaks form.
2. Add melted chocolate to the whipped cream and whisk until smooth.
3. In another bowl, whisk egg yolks over hot water until pale and thickened.
4. Gradually add syrup to the egg yolk mixture while whisking continuously.
5. Fold the egg syrup mixture into the chocolate/cream mixture using a spatula until well combined.
6. Set aside for use in the rest of the Progres with Grand Marnier recipe.
Source: Great Chefs of San Francisco, Avon Books, 1984
Chef: Roberto Gerometta, Chez Michel, San Francisco, CA
